mapper.select:
SELECT TMT.TeamCode AS CODE , TMT.Name AS NAME FROM XBOLTAPP.CRM_CUST_MST CMST Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TMT on CMST.TeamID = TMT.TeamID AND TMT.LanguageID = #{languageID} WHERE CMST.CustLvl = 'C'
And CMST.CustomerNo in ( SELECT ClientID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_PROJECT TP left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_PJT_MEMBER_REL TPMR on TP.ProjectID = TPMR.ProjectID Where TPMR.MemberID = #{userID} And TP.ProjectType = 'CSR' )
ORDER BY NAME

/* 기본규모, 특성규모, 역량규모 산정 */ WITH PRICE AS( SELECT APPLY_YEAR ,CORP_ID ,SVC_TYPE_CD ,ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN UNIT_PRICE_LEVEL = 'B' THEN UNIT_PRICE END) ,0) AS UNIT_PRICE_B ,ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN UNIT_PRICE_LEVEL = 'S' THEN UNIT_PRICE END) ,0) AS UNIT_PRICE_S ,ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN UNIT_PRICE_LEVEL = 'H' THEN UNIT_PRICE END) ,0) AS UNIT_PRICE_H ,ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN UNIT_PRICE_LEVEL = 'M' THEN UNIT_PRICE END) ,0) AS UNIT_PRICE_M ,ISNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN UNIT_PRICE_LEVEL = 'L' THEN UNIT_PRICE END) ,0) AS UNIT_PRICE_L FROM XBOLTDLM.SVC_TYPE_UNIT_PRICE WHERE 1=1 AND APPLY_YEAR = SUBSTRING(#{APPLY_YM},1,4) AND CORP_ID = #{CORP_ID} GROUP BY APPLY_YEAR ,CORP_ID ,SVC_TYPE_CD ) , BS AS ( SELECT A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.CORP_NAME ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD /* 관리 (운영, 장애, 개선, 지원)*/ ,A.SVC_TYPE_NAME ,( CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00001' THEN 'SVS00001' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00002' THEN 'SVS00002' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00003' THEN 'SVS00003' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI001' THEN 'SMI001' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI002' THEN 'SMI002' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI003' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI003' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI003' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI003_P' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI004' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI004' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI004' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI004_P' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS000100' THEN 'TOT_V' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS000102' THEN 'TOT_V' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS000100_SVC' THEN 'TOT_P' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS000102_SVC' THEN 'TOT_P' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID020' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI015_SMID020_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID020' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI015_SMID020_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID020' THEN 'SMI015_SMID020' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID021' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI015_SMID021_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID021' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI015_SMID021_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID021' THEN 'SMI015_SMID021' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID022' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI015_SMID022_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID022' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI015_SMID022_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID022' THEN 'SMI015_SMID022' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI016_SMID023' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI016_SMID023_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI016_SMID023' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI016_SMID023_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI016_SMID023' THEN 'SMI016_SMID023' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI017_SMID024' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI017_SMID024_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI017_SMID024' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI017_SMID024_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI017_SMID024' THEN 'SMI017_SMID024' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID025' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI015_SMID025_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID025' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI015_SMID025_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID025' THEN 'SMI015_SMID025' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID026' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI015_SMID026_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID026' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI015_SMID026_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID026' THEN 'SMI015_SMID026' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID027' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI015_SMID027_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID027' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI015_SMID027_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI015_SMID027' THEN 'SMI015_SMID027' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI016_SMID028' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI016_SMID028_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI016_SMID028' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI016_SMID028_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI016_SMID028' THEN 'SMI016_SMID028' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI017_SMID029' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '1' THEN 'SMI017_SMID029_1' WHEN B.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI017_SMID029' AND B.MSR_SEQ = '2' THEN 'SMI017_SMID029_2' --WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI017_SMID029' THEN 'SMI017_SMID029' END ) AS SVC_SCALE_CD /* 규모 (기본, 특성, 역량) */ ,( CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00001' THEN '기본규모' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00002' THEN '특성규모' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00003' THEN '역량규모' WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI001' THEN '정기업무량' END ) AS SVC_SCALE_NAME , isNULL(A.MSR_VAL, 0) AS SVC_SCALE_VAL /* 금액 */ , isNULL(B.MSR_VAL, 0) AS SVC_SCALE_VAL_B /* 금액 */ ,A.REG_ID ,A.REG_DT FROM XBOLTDLM.SVC_ADM_MSR_ITEM A LEFT JOIN XBOLTDLM.SVC_ADM_MSR_DTL B ON A.APPLY_YM = B.APPLY_YM AND A.CORP_ID = B.CORP_ID AND A.MSR_ITEM_ID = B.MSR_ITEM_ID WHERE ( A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS%SVS00001' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS%SVS00002' --OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'ITS%SVS00003' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'SMI001' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'SMI002' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'SMI003' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'SMI004' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'ITS000100' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'ITS000102' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'ITS000100_SVC' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID = 'ITS000102_SVC' OR A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE 'SMI01%_SMID0%' ) AND A.SVC_TYPE_CD NOT IN('ITS000101') AND 1 = CASE WHEN A.SVC_TYPE_CD = 'ITS000102' AND A.MSR_ITEM_ID LIKE '%SVS00002' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AND A.APPLY_YM = #{APPLY_YM} AND A.CORP_ID = #{CORP_ID}
) , BS2 AS ( SELECT APPLY_YM , CORP_ID , CORP_NAME , SVC_TYPE_CD , SVC_TYPE_NAME , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SVS00001' THEN SVC_SCALE_CD END, 0) AS SVS00001 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SVS00001' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SVS00001_VAL , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SVS00002' THEN SVC_SCALE_CD END, 0) AS SVS00002 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SVS00002' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SVS00002_VAL , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI001' THEN SVC_SCALE_CD END, 0) AS SMI001 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI001' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI001_VAL , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI002' THEN SVC_SCALE_CD END, 0) AS SMI002 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI002' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI002_VAL , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI003' THEN SVC_SCALE_CD END, 0) AS SMI003 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI003_P' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI003_P , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI003' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI003_VAL , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI004' THEN SVC_SCALE_CD END, 0) AS SMI004 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI004_P' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI004_P , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI004' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI004_VAL , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'TOT_V' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS TOT_V , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'TOT_P' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS TOT_P , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID020_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID020_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID020_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID020_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID020_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID020 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID021_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID021_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID021_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID021_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID021_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID021 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID022_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID022_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID022_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID022_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID022_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID022 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI016_SMID023_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI016_SMID023_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI016_SMID023_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI016_SMID023_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI016_SMID023_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI016_SMID023 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI017_SMID024_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI017_SMID024_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI017_SMID024_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI017_SMID024_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI017_SMID024_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI017_SMID024 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID025_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID025_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID025_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID025_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID025_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID025 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID026_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID026_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID026_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID026_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID026_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID026 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID027_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID027_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID027_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID027_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI015_SMID027_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI015_SMID027 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI016_SMID028_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI016_SMID028_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI016_SMID028_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI016_SMID028_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI016_SMID028_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI016_SMID028 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI017_SMID029_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI017_SMID029_1 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI017_SMID029_2' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL_B END, 0) AS SMI017_SMID029_2 , ISNULL(CASE WHEN SVC_SCALE_CD = 'SMI017_SMID029_1' THEN SVC_SCALE_VAL END, 0) AS SMI017_SMID029 FROM BS ) SELECT APPLY_YM ,CORP_ID ,CORP_NAME ,SVC_TYPE_CD /* 관리 (운영, 장애, 개선, 지원)*/ ,SVC_TYPE_NAME , (MAX(SMI001_VAL)) AS SMI001_VAL , (MAX(SMI002_VAL)) AS SMI002_VAL , (MAX(SMI003_P)) AS SMI003_P , (MAX(SMI003_VAL)) AS SMI003_VAL , (MAX(SMI004_P)) AS SMI004_P , (MAX(SMI004_VAL)) AS SMI004_VAL , (MAX(SVS00001_VAL)) AS SVS00001_VAL , (MAX(SVS00002_VAL)) AS SVS00002_VAL , (MAX(SMI015_SMID020_1)) AS SMI015_SMID020_1 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID020_2)) AS SMI015_SMID020_2 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID020)) AS SMI015_SMID020 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID021_1)) AS SMI015_SMID021_1 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID021_2)) AS SMI015_SMID021_2 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID021)) AS SMI015_SMID021 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID022_1)) AS SMI015_SMID022_1 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID022_2)) AS SMI015_SMID022_2 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID022)) AS SMI015_SMID022 , (MAX(SMI016_SMID023_1)) AS SMI016_SMID023_1 , (MAX(SMI016_SMID023_2)) AS SMI016_SMID023_2 , (MAX(SMI016_SMID023)) AS SMI016_SMID023 , (MAX(SMI017_SMID024_1)) AS SMI017_SMID024_1 , (MAX(SMI017_SMID024_2)) AS SMI017_SMID024_2 , (MAX(SMI017_SMID024)) AS SMI017_SMID024 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID025_1)) AS SMI015_SMID025_1 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID025_2)) AS SMI015_SMID025_2 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID025)) AS SMI015_SMID025 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID026_1)) AS SMI015_SMID026_1 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID026_2)) AS SMI015_SMID026_2 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID026)) AS SMI015_SMID026 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID027_1)) AS SMI015_SMID027_1 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID027_2)) AS SMI015_SMID027_2 , (MAX(SMI015_SMID027)) AS SMI015_SMID027 , (MAX(SMI016_SMID028_1)) AS SMI016_SMID028_1 , (MAX(SMI016_SMID028_2)) AS SMI016_SMID028_2 , (MAX(SMI016_SMID028)) AS SMI016_SMID028 , (MAX(SMI017_SMID029_1)) AS SMI017_SMID029_1 , (MAX(SMI017_SMID029_2)) AS SMI017_SMID029_2 , (MAX(SMI017_SMID029)) AS SMI017_SMID029 , (MAX(TOT_V)) AS TOT_V , ((SELECT UNIT_PRICE_B FROM PRICE X WHERE X.SVC_TYPE_CD = BS2.SVC_TYPE_CD)) PRICE , (MAX(TOT_P)) AS TOT_P , ( CASE WHEN SVC_TYPE_CD IN('ITS000100') THEN '정기업무량 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI001_VAL) AS VARCHAR) + ' 비정기업무량 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI002_VAL) AS VARCHAR) + ' 정규시간외 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI003_VAL) AS VARCHAR) + ' 정기일수외 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI004_VAL) AS VARCHAR) WHEN SVC_TYPE_CD IN('ITS000102') THEN '신규(1) 화면 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID020_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID020_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID020) AS VARCHAR) + ' 배치 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID021_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID021_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID021) AS VARCHAR) + ' CONFIG : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID022_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID022_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID022) AS VARCHAR) + ' SQL : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI016_SMID023_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI016_SMID023_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI016_SMID023) AS VARCHAR) + ' 테이블 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI017_SMID024_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI017_SMID024_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI017_SMID024) AS VARCHAR) + ' 변경(0.7) 화면 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID025_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID025_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID025) AS VARCHAR) + ' 배치 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID026_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID026_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID026) AS VARCHAR) + ' CONFIG : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID027_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID027_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI015_SMID027) AS VARCHAR) + ' SQL : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI016_SMID028_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI016_SMID028_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI016_SMID028) AS VARCHAR) + ' 테이블 : ' + CAST(MAX(SMI017_SMID029_1) AS VARCHAR) + 'x' + CAST(MAX(SMI017_SMID029_2) AS VARCHAR) + '=' + CAST(MAX(SMI017_SMID029) AS VARCHAR) END ) AS REMARK FROM BS2 GROUP BY APPLY_YM ,CORP_ID ,CORP_NAME ,SVC_TYPE_CD ,SVC_TYPE_NAME

WITH P_PARAM AS ( SELECT 'ITS000102' AS P_SVC_TYPE_CD ,#{APPLY_YM} AS P_APPLY_YM ,#{CORP_ID} AS P_CORP_ID ) SELECT Z.APPLY_YM ,Z.CORP_ID ,(SELECT TOP(1) X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamCode = z.CORP_ID AND X.LanguageID = '1042') AS CORP_NAME ,Z.SVC_TYPE_CD ,Z.SVC_CI_ID ,ISNULL( CC.PlainText , Z.SVC_CI_ID) AS SVC_CI_NAME ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI015_SMID020),0) AS SMI015_SMID020 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-화면기능 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI015_SMID021),0) AS SMI015_SMID021 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-배치프로그램 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI015_SMID022),0) AS SMI015_SMID022 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-Config 화면 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI015_SMID025),0) AS SMI015_SMID025 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-화면기능 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI015_SMID026),0) AS SMI015_SMID026 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-배치프로그램 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI015_SMID027),0) AS SMI015_SMID027 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-Config 화면 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI016_SMID023),0) AS SMI016_SMID023 /* DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 점수_신규 DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI016_SMID028),0) AS SMI016_SMID028 /* DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 점수_변경 DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI017_SMID024),0) AS SMI017_SMID024 /* 데이터 기능 점수_신규 데이터기능 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI017_SMID029),0) AS SMI017_SMID029 /* 데이터 기능 점수_변경 데이터기능 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI018 ),0) AS SMI018 /* 개선 사이즈 보정계수_ V */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI019 ),0) AS SMI019 /* 애플리케이션 유형 보정계수_ V */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI020 ),0) AS SMI020 /* 프로그래밍 언어 보정계수_ V */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI021 ),0) AS SMI021 /* 구현품질 보정계수_ */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI022 ),0) AS SMI022 /* 긴급 개선요청 비율_ 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI023 ),0) AS SMI023 /* 최초 합의 납기일 준수율_ 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI024 ),0) AS SMI024 /* 성능향상비율_ 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(SMI025 ),0) AS SMI025 /* 개선-품질역량수준_ 1 */
FROM ( SELECT A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD ,A.SVC_CI_ID ,0 AS SMI015_SMID020 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-화면기능 1 */ ,0 AS SMI015_SMID021 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-배치프로그램 1 */ ,0 AS SMI015_SMID022 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-Config 화면 1 */ ,0 AS SMI015_SMID025 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-화면기능 1 */ ,0 AS SMI015_SMID026 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-배치프로그램 1 */ ,0 AS SMI015_SMID027 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-Config 화면 1 */ ,0 AS SMI016_SMID023 /* DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 점수_신규 DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 1 */ ,0 AS SMI016_SMID028 /* DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 점수_변경 DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 1 */ ,0 AS SMI017_SMID024 /* 데이터 기능 점수_신규 데이터기능 1 */ ,0 AS SMI017_SMID029 /* 데이터 기능 점수_변경 데이터기능 1 */
,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI018' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI018 /* 개선 사이즈 보정계수_ V */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI019' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI019 /* 애플리케이션 유형 보정계수_ V */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI020' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI020 /* 프로그래밍 언어 보정계수_ V */
,0 AS SMI021 /* 구현품질 보정계수_ */ ,0 AS SMI022 /* 긴급 개선요청 비율_ 1 */ ,0 AS SMI023 /* 최초 합의 납기일 준수율_ 1 */ ,0 AS SMI024 /* 성능향상비율_ 1 */ ,0 AS SMI025 /* 개선-품질역량수준_ 1 */ FROM XBOLTDLM.SVC_ADM_MSR_ITEM_2 A ,P_PARAM WHERE A.SVC_TYPE_CD = P_SVC_TYPE_CD AND A.APPLY_YM = P_APPLY_YM AND A.CORP_ID = P_CORP_ID AND A.MSR_ITEM_ID IN ( 'SMI018' , 'SMI019' , 'SMI020' ) GROUP BY A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD ,A.SVC_CI_ID UNION ALL SELECT A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD ,A.SVC_CI_ID
,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI015_SMID020' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI015_SMID020 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-화면기능 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI015_SMID021' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI015_SMID021 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-배치프로그램 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI015_SMID022' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI015_SMID022 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_신규 트랜잭션 기능-Config 화면 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI015_SMID025' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI015_SMID025 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-화면기능 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI015_SMID026' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI015_SMID026 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-배치프로그램 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI015_SMID027' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI015_SMID027 /* 트랜잭션 기능점수_변경 트랜잭션 기능-Config 화면 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI016_SMID023' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI016_SMID023 /* DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 점수_신규 DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI016_SMID028' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI016_SMID028 /* DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 점수_변경 DATA(SQL) 프로그램 기능 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI017_SMID024' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI017_SMID024 /* 데이터 기능 점수_신규 데이터기능 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI017_SMID029' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI017_SMID029 /* 데이터 기능 점수_변경 데이터기능 1 */
,0 AS SMI018 /* 개선 사이즈 보정계수_ V */ ,0 AS SMI019 /* 애플리케이션 유형 보정계수_ V */ ,0 AS SMI020 /* 프로그래밍 언어 보정계수_ V */
,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI021' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI021 /* 구현품질 보정계수_ */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI022' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI022 /* 긴급 개선요청 비율_ 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI023' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI023 /* 최초 합의 납기일 준수율_ 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI024' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI024 /* 성능향상비율_ 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI025' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END ) AS SMI025 /* 개선-품질역량수준_ 1 */ FROM XBOLTDLM.SVC_ADM_MSR_DTL_2 A ,P_PARAM WHERE A.SVC_TYPE_CD = P_SVC_TYPE_CD AND A.APPLY_YM = P_APPLY_YM AND A.CORP_ID = P_CORP_ID AND A.MSR_ITEM_ID IN ( 'SMI015_SMID020' ,'SMI015_SMID021' ,'SMI015_SMID022' ,'SMI015_SMID025' ,'SMI015_SMID026' ,'SMI015_SMID027' ,'SMI016_SMID023' ,'SMI016_SMID028' ,'SMI017_SMID024' ,'SMI017_SMID029' ,'SMI021' ,'SMI022' ,'SMI023' ,'SMI024' ,'SMI025' ) AND A.MSR_SEQ = '1' GROUP BY A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD ,A.SVC_CI_ID ) Z Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC on CC.ItemID = (SELECT TOP(1) ITEMID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = z.SVC_CI_ID) and CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' GROUP BY Z.APPLY_YM ,Z.CORP_ID ,Z.SVC_TYPE_CD ,Z.SVC_CI_ID ,ISNULL( CC.PlainText , Z.SVC_CI_ID)

WITH P_PARAM AS ( SELECT 'ITS000100' AS P_SVC_TYPE_CD ,#{APPLY_YM} AS P_APPLY_YM ,#{CORP_ID} AS P_CORP_ID ) SELECT Z.APPLY_YM ,Z.CORP_ID ,(SELECT TOP(1) X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamCode = z.CORP_ID AND X.LanguageID = '1042') AS CORP_NAME ,Z.SVC_TYPE_CD ,Z.SVC_CI_ID ,ISNULL( CC.PlainText , Z.SVC_CI_ID) AS SVC_CI_NAME ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI001),0) AS SMI001 /* 정기업무량 V */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI002),0) AS SMI002 /* 비정기업무량 V */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI003),0) AS SMI003 /* 정규시간외 서비스 2 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI004),0) AS SMI004 /* 정기일수 외 서비스 2 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI005),0) AS SMI005 /* 서비스 가용성 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI006),0) AS SMI006 /* 장애복구 시간 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI007),0) AS SMI007 /* 장애보고 시간 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI008),0) AS SMI008 /* 정기작업적정처리율 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI009),0) AS SMI009 /* 운영-품질역량수준 1 */ ,ISNULL(SUM(Z.SMI010),0) AS SMI010 /* 가치제안효과 1 */ FROM ( SELECT A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD ,A.SVC_CI_ID ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI001' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI001 /* 정기업무량 V */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI002' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI002 /* 비정기업무량 V */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI003' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI003 /* 정규시간외 서비스 2 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI004' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI004 /* 정기일수 외 서비스 2 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI005' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI005 /* 서비스 가용성 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI006' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI006 /* 장애복구 시간 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI007' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI007 /* 장애보고 시간 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI008' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI008 /* 정기작업적정처리율 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI009' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI009 /* 운영-품질역량수준 1 */ ,SUM(CASE WHEN A.MSR_ITEM_ID ='SMI010' THEN ISNULL(A.MSR_VAL,0) ElSE 0 END) AS SMI010 /* 가치제안효과 1 */ FROM XBOLTDLM.SVC_ADM_MSR_ITEM_2 A ,P_PARAM WHERE A.SVC_TYPE_CD = P_SVC_TYPE_CD AND A.APPLY_YM = P_APPLY_YM AND A.CORP_ID = P_CORP_ID AND A.MSR_ITEM_ID IN ( 'SMI001', 'SMI002', 'SMI003', 'SMI004') GROUP BY A.APPLY_YM ,A.CORP_ID ,A.SVC_TYPE_CD ,A.SVC_CI_ID ) Z Left outer join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC on CC.ItemID = (SELECT TOP(1) ITEMID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM WHERE Identifier = z.SVC_CI_ID) and CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' GROUP BY Z.APPLY_YM ,Z.CORP_ID ,Z.SVC_TYPE_CD ,Z.SVC_CI_ID ,ISNULL( CC.PlainText , Z.SVC_CI_ID) ORDER BY SVC_CI_ID

SELECT A.RefTeamCode AS cd_company , A.CORP_NAME AS cd_company_nm , A.SRTypeName AS tbl_nm , A.svc_ci_id AS svc_ci_id , A.SVC_CI_NAME AS name_lv1 , A.SRCODE AS id , A.CategoryName AS cat_name , A.LOGINID AS usr_id , A.NAME AS user_nm , '' AS nm_dept , (A.msr_val + A.mng_sps) as totalSum , FORMAT(A.work_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS work_date , A.holyday AS holyday , A.business_hours AS business_hour , A.overtime AS overtime , A.regular_work_val , A.casual_work_val , A.msr_val , A.mng_sps1 , A.mng_sps2 , A.mng_sps , A.REQ_USER_ID AS req_usr_id , A.REQ_NAME AS req_usr_name , A.REQ_TEAM_NAME AS req_usr_dept_name , A.SpeCode AS status_id , A.SpeCode_NAME AS status_name , A.LOGINID AS step_mng_id , A.NAME AS step_mng_nm , LEFT(A.Subject, 2000) AS title , LEFT(A.Description, 2000) AS notice , LEFT(A.solvnt, 2000) AS solvnt , FORMAT(A.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS reg_date , FORMAT(isNull(A.rcptDATE, A.RegDT), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS rcpt_date , FORMAT(isNull(isNull(A.closeDATE, A.CompletionDT), A.WORK_DATE), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS close_date FROM ( SELECT BB.Srid , BB.SRCODE , CC.RefTeamCode , (SELECT TOP(1) X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamCode = CC.RefTeamCode AND X.LanguageID = '1042') AS CORP_NAME , BB.SRType , (SELECT NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY WHERE CATEGORY = 'SRTP' AND TYPECODE = BB.SRType and LanguageID = '1042') AS SRTypeName , (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 END) AS SRArea , (SELECT TOP(1) X.Identifier FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM X WHERE X.ITEMID = (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END)) AS SVC_CI_ID , (SELECT CC.PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC WHERE CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND CC.ItemID = (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END)) AS SVC_CI_NAME , BB.Category , BB.SubCategory , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY X WHERE x.TypeCode = BB.Category And x.Category = 'SRCAT' And x.LanguageID = '1042') + ' > ' + (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY X WHERE x.TypeCode = BB.SubCategory And x.Category = 'SRCAT' And x.LanguageID = '1042') AS CategoryName , AA.EmpNo , (SELECT TOP(1) X.LOGINID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = AA.MemberID OR X.LoginID = AA.EmpNo) AS LOGINID , AA.MemberID , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = AA.MemberID OR X.LoginID = AA.EmpNo) AS NAME , '' AS DEPT_NAME , BB.RequestUserID , (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RequestUserID) AS REQ_USER_ID , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RequestUserID) AS REQ_NAME , BB.RequestTeamID , (SELECT X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamID = BB.RequestTeamID And x.LanguageID = '1042') AS REQ_TEAM_NAME , AA.SpeCode , (SELECT x.itemId FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM X WHERE X.Identifier = AA.SpeCode) AS process_step_id , (SELECT CC.PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC WHERE CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND CC.ItemID = (SELECT x.itemId FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM X WHERE X.Identifier = AA.SpeCode)) AS SpeCode_NAME , BB.Subject , BB.Description , CASE WHEN BB.SRType IN('WRK') THEN (SELECT TOP(1) X.value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_WKS_ATTR X WHERE X.AttrTypeCode IN ('SRAT0001') AND X.SRID = BB.SRID) ELSE (SELECT X.value FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR X WHERE X.AttrTypeCode IN ('SRAT0005', 'SRAT0071') AND X.SRID = BB.SRID AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_ATTR X WHERE X.AttrTypeCode IN ('SRAT0005', 'SRAT0071') AND X.SRID = BB.SRID)) END AS solvnt , BB.RegDT , AA.WORK_DATE , BB.CompletionDT , (SELECT X.EndTime FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = AA.specode AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = AA.specode)) closeDATE , (SELECT X.StartTime FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = AA.specode AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = AA.specode)) rcptDATE , holyday , aa.business_hours , aa.overtime , ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) AS msr_val /* 16.규모산정 */ , ( ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) * CASE WHEN holyday = 'N' THEN ROUND( CASE WHEN aa.overtime = 0 THEN 0 WHEN aa.overtime IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE aa.overtime / (aa.business_hours + aa.overtime) END * 0.5, 2) ELSE 0 END ) + ( ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) * CASE WHEN holyday = 'Y' THEN ( CASE WHEN ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) > 0 THEN ( ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) / ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) * 0.5 ) ELSE 0 END ) ELSE 0 END ) AS mng_sps /* 19.운영특성최종계산값 */ , ISNULL( CASE WHEN BB.SubCategory IN( SELECT TypeCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY WHERE TypeCode IN( SELECT SRCatID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT WHERE SRType IN('WRK', 'REQ', 'DCM', 'ACM') ) AND SUBSTRING(description, 1, 3) = 'RE_' ) THEN (aa.business_hours + aa.overtime) END, 0) AS regular_work_val /* 14.정기업무량 */ , ISNULL( CASE WHEN BB.SubCategory IN( SELECT TypeCode FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY WHERE TypeCode IN( SELECT SRCatID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_CAT WHERE SRType IN('WRK', 'REQ', 'DCM', 'ACM') ) AND SUBSTRING(description, 1, 3) not in ('RE_') ) OR BB.SRType IN('DCM') THEN (aa.business_hours + aa.overtime) END, 0) AS casual_work_val /* 15.비정기업무량 */ , CASE WHEN holyday = 'N' THEN ROUND( CASE WHEN aa.overtime = 0 THEN 0 WHEN aa.overtime IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE aa.overtime / (aa.business_hours + aa.overtime) END * 0.5, 2) ELSE 0 END AS mng_sps1 /* 17.정규시간외 */ , CASE WHEN holyday = 'Y' THEN ( CASE WHEN ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) > 0 THEN ( ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) / ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) * 0.5 ) ELSE 0 END ) ELSE 0 END AS mng_sps2 /* 18.정규일수외 */ FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_MBR_RCD AA , XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST BB , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND ( aa.business_hours + aa.overtime ) > 0 AND BB.SubCategory IS NOT NULL AND FORMAT(aa.work_date, 'yyyyMM') = #{APPLY_YM} AND AA.srID = BB.Srid AND ( BB.SRType IN('REQ', 'WRK', 'DCM') OR 1 = CASE WHEN BB.SRType IN('ACM') AND AA.SpeCode LIKE 'REQ%' THEN 1 END ) AND BB.ClientID = CC.ClientID AND CC.RefTeamCode = #{CORP_ID} AND (BB.SRArea1 IS NOT NULL AND BB.SRArea1 <> 0) ) A ORDER BY A.SRCode, A.WORK_DATE

SELECT A.CORP_ID AS cd_company /* 0.관계사코드 */ , A.CORP_NAME AS cd_company_nm /* 1.관계사명 */ , A.svc_ci_id AS svc_ci_id /* 2.서비스ID */ , A.SVC_CI_NAME AS name_lv1 /* 3.서비스명 */ , A.SRCode AS id /* 4.티켓ID */ , LEFT(A.Subject, 2000) AS title /* 5.제목 */ , LEFT(A.Description, 2000) AS notice /* 6.내용 */ , A.req_user_id AS req_usr_id /* 7.요청자사번 */ , A.req_name AS req_usr_name /* 8.요청자명 */ , A.req_team_name AS req_usr_dept_name /* 9.요청부서명 */ , FORMAT(A.regDt, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS reg_date /* 10.등록일자 */ , A.reg_user_id AS usr_id /* 11.등록자사번 */ , A.reg_name AS user_nm /* 12.등록자명 */ , A.reg_team_name AS nm_dept /* 13.등록자부서명 */ , FORMAT(A.rcptdate, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS rcpt_date /* 14.접수일자 */ , FORMAT(A.CompletionDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS close_date /* 15.종료일자 */ , A.new_scrin_output_qy AS new_scrin_output_qy /* 16.신규화면기능산출물수 */ , A.new_batch_output_qy AS new_batch_output_qy /* 17.신규배치프로그램산출물수 */ , A.new_config_output_qy AS new_config_output_qy /* 18.신규Config화면패키지산출물수 */ , A.new_data_output_qy AS new_data_output_qy /* 19.신규DataSQL프로그램산출물수 */ , A.new_table_output_qy AS new_table_output_qy /* 20.신규테이블산출물수 */ , A.change_scrin_output_qy AS change_scrin_output_qy /* 21.변경화명기능산출물수 */ , A.change_batch_output_qy AS change_batch_output_qy /* 22.변경배치프로그램산출물수 */ , A.change_config_output_qy AS change_config_output_qy /* 23.변경Config화면패키지산출물수 */ , A.change_data_output_qy AS change_data_output_qy /* 24.변경DataSQL프로그램산출물수 */ , A.change_table_output_qy AS change_table_output_qy /* 25.변경테이블산출물수 */ , A.ap_impro_manage_cal AS ap_impro_manage_cal /* 26.개선기본최종계산값 */ , A.new_scrin_output_dtl AS new_scrin_output_dtl /* 27.신규화면기능산출물_상세 */ , A.new_batch_output_dtl AS new_batch_output_dtl /* 28.신규배치프로그램산출_상세 */ , A.new_config_output_dtl AS new_config_output_dtl /* 29.신규Config화면패키지산출물_상세 */ , A.new_data_output_dtl AS new_data_output_dtl /* 30.신규DataSQL프로그램산출물_상세 */ , A.new_table_output_dtl AS new_table_output_dtl /* 31.신규테이블산출물_상세 */ , A.change_scrin_output_dtl AS change_scrin_output_dtl /* 32.변경화명기능산출물수_상세 */ , A.change_batch_output_dtl AS change_batch_output_dtl /* 33.변경배치프로그램산출물수_상세 */ , A.change_config_output_dtl AS change_config_output_dtl /* 34.변경Config화면패키지산출물수_상세 */ , A.change_data_output_dtl AS change_data_output_dtl /* 35.변경DataSQL프로그램산출물수_상세 */ , A.change_table_output_dtl AS change_table_output_dtl /* 36.변경테이블산출물수_상세 */ FROM ( SELECT FORMAT(BB.CompletionDT, 'yyyyMM') AS APPLY_YM ,CC.RefTeamCode AS CORP_ID ,(SELECT TOP(1) X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamCode = CC.RefTeamCode AND X.LanguageID = '1042') AS CORP_NAME ,BB.Srid , BB.SRCODE , CC.RefTeamCode , BB.SRType , (SELECT NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY WHERE CATEGORY = 'SRTP' AND TYPECODE = BB.SRType and LanguageID = '1042') AS SRTypeName , (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END) AS SRArea , (SELECT TOP(1) X.Identifier FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM X WHERE X.ITEMID = (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END)) AS SVC_CI_ID , (SELECT CC.PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC WHERE CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND CC.ItemID = (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END)) AS SVC_CI_NAME , BB.Category , BB.SubCategory , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY X WHERE x.TypeCode = BB.Category And x.Category = 'SRCAT' And x.LanguageID = '1042') + ' > ' + (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY X WHERE x.TypeCode = BB.SubCategory And x.Category = 'SRCAT' And x.LanguageID = '1042') AS CategoryName , BB.RegUserID --, (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RegUserID) AS REG_USER_ID --, (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RegUserID) AS REG_NAME , BB.RegTeamID --, (SELECT X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamID = BB.RegTeamID And x.LanguageID = '1042') AS REG_TEAM_NAME , BB.RequestUserID , (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RequestUserID) AS REQ_USER_ID , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RequestUserID) AS REQ_NAME , BB.RequestTeamID , (SELECT X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamID = BB.RequestTeamID And x.LanguageID = '1042') AS REQ_TEAM_NAME , BB.Subject , BB.Description --, BB.RegDT , BB.CompletionDT , (SELECT X.StartTime FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0002' AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0002')) rcptDATE , ISNULL((SELECT X.StartTime FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001' AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001')), BB.RegDT) RegDT , (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = ISNULL((SELECT X.ActorID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001' AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001')), BB.RegUserID)) REG_USER_ID , (SELECT X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = ISNULL((SELECT X.ActorID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001' AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001')), BB.RegUserID)) REG_NAME , (SELECT X.NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT X WHERE X.TeamID = ISNULL((SELECT X.TeamID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001' AND X.SEQ = (SELECT MAX(X.SEQ) FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_ACTIVITY_LOG X WHERE X.PID = BB.srid AND x.SpeCode = 'ACM0001')), BB.RegTeamID) And x.LanguageID = '1042') REG_TEAM_NAME , CASE WHEN ISNULL(new_scrin_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(new_scrin_output_qy, '0') END AS new_scrin_output_qy, /* 16.신규화면기능산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(new_batch_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(new_batch_output_qy, '0') END AS new_batch_output_qy, /* 17.신규배치프로그램산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(new_config_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(new_config_output_qy, '0') END AS new_config_output_qy, /* 18.신규Config화면패키지산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(new_data_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(new_data_output_qy, '0') END AS new_data_output_qy, /* 19.신규DataSQL프로그램산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(new_table_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(new_table_output_qy, '0') END AS new_table_output_qy, /* 20.신규테이블산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(change_scrin_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(change_scrin_output_qy, '0') END AS change_scrin_output_qy, /* 21.변경화명기능산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(change_batch_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(change_batch_output_qy, '0') END AS change_batch_output_qy, /* 22.변경배치프로그램산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(change_config_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(change_config_output_qy, '0') END AS change_config_output_qy, /* 23.변경Config화면패키지산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(change_data_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(change_data_output_qy, '0') END AS change_data_output_qy, /* 24.변경DataSQL프로그램산출물수 */ CASE WHEN ISNULL(change_table_output_qy, '0') = '' THEN '0' ELSE ISNULL(change_table_output_qy, '0') END AS change_table_output_qy, /* 25.변경테이블산출물수 */ ISNULL(TRY_CAST( ( ( ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(new_scrin_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 4.3 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(new_batch_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 4.3 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(new_config_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 4.3 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(new_data_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 1.4 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(new_table_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 6.8 ) ) * 1 ) + ( ( ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(change_scrin_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 4.3 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(change_batch_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 4.3 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(change_config_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 4.3 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(change_data_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 1.4 ) + ( ISNULL(TRY_CAST(change_table_output_qy AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) * 6.8 ) ) * 0.7 ) AS DECIMAL(15, 2)), 0) AS ap_impro_manage_cal, /* 26.개선기본최종계산값 */ new_scrin_output_dtl AS new_scrin_output_dtl, /* 27.신규화면기능산출물_상세 */ new_batch_output_dtl AS new_batch_output_dtl, /* 28.신규배치프로그램산출_상세 */ new_config_output_dtl AS new_config_output_dtl, /* 29.신규Config화면패키지산출물_상세 */ new_data_output_dtl AS new_data_output_dtl, /* 30.신규DataSQL프로그램산출물_상세 */ new_table_output_dtl AS new_table_output_dtl, /* 31.신규테이블산출물_상세 */ change_scrin_output_dtl AS change_scrin_output_dtl, /* 32.변경화명기능산출물수_상세 */ change_batch_output_dtl AS change_batch_output_dtl, /* 33.변경배치프로그램산출물수_상세 */ change_config_output_dtl AS change_config_output_dtl, /* 34.변경Config화면패키지산출물수_상세 */ change_data_output_dtl AS change_data_output_dtl, /* 35.변경DataSQL프로그램산출물수_상세 */ change_table_output_dtl AS change_table_output_dtl /* 36.변경테이블산출물수_상세 */ FROM (SELECT DISTINCT x.srID FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_MBR_RCD x WHERE ( x.business_hours + x.overtime ) > 0)AA , XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST BB , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM CC , XBOLTAPP.ESM_SCR_OUTPUT_RCD DD WHERE 1 = 1 AND FORMAT(BB.CompletionDT, 'yyyyMM') = #{APPLY_YM} AND AA.srID = BB.Srid AND BB.srID = DD.Srid AND BB.SRType = 'ACM' AND BB.ClientID = CC.ClientID AND CC.RefTeamCode = #{CORP_ID} ) A ORDER BY A.SRCode, A.CompletionDT

SELECT BB.SRCODE AS Id , CASE WHEN BB.SRType = 'REQ' THEN '운영관리' WHEN BB.SRType = 'ACM' THEN '개선관리' WHEN BB.SRType = 'WRK' THEN '운영관리' WHEN BB.SRType = 'DCM' THEN '운영관리' END AS Service_name , (SELECT NAME FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY WHERE CATEGORY = 'SRTP' AND TYPECODE = BB.SRType and LanguageID = '1042') AS Proc_name --, (SELECT TOP(1) X.Identifier FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM X WHERE X.ITEMID = (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END)) AS SVC_CI_ID , (SELECT CC.PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC WHERE CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND CC.ItemID = (CASE WHEN BB.SRArea2 IS NULL OR BB.SRArea2 = 0 THEN BB.SRArea1 ELSE BB.SRArea2 END)) AS Svc_ci_name --, (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RequestUserID) AS REQ_USER_ID , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RequestUserID) AS Req_usr_name --, (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RegUserID) AS REG_USER_ID , (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RegUserID) AS Reg_usr_name , FORMAT(BB.RegDT, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS Reg_date , LEFT(BB.Subject, 2000) AS Title --, (SELECT X.LoginID FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.ReceiptUserID) AS assignee_id --, (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.ReceiptUserID) AS assignee_name --, BB.status , (SELECT CC.PlainText FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR CC WHERE CC.LanguageID = '1042' and CC.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' AND CC.ItemID = (SELECT x.itemId FROM XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM X WHERE X.Identifier = BB.status)) AS Status_name --, (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY X WHERE x.TypeCode = BB.Category And x.Category = 'SRCAT' And x.LanguageID = '1042') -- + ' > ' + (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY X WHERE x.TypeCode = BB.SubCategory And x.Category = 'SRCAT' And x.LanguageID = '1042') AS CategoryName , '진행중' AS Close_status , isnull((SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.ReceiptUserID), (SELECT X.Name FROM XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER X WHERE X.MemberID = BB.RegUserID)) AS Assignee FROM XBOLTAPP.ESM_SR_MST BB , XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND BB.CompletionDT IS NULL AND BB.SRType IN ( 'WRK', 'DCM', 'ACM', 'REQ' ) AND BB.ClientID = CC.ClientID AND CC.RefTeamCode = #{CORP_ID} AND FORMAT(BB.RegDT, 'yyyyMM') BETWEEN #{F_APPLY_YM} AND #{T_APPLY_YM} ORDER BY BB.RegDT DESC
